clues: User-specific policy settings are being applied when no user is logged into a shared kiosk computer.
The kiosk computer shows desktop icons and shortcuts that belong to a specific user.
The kiosk computer is configured with loopback processing mode in Group Policy.
The loopback processing mode is set to 'Replace' instead of 'Merge'.
The user-specific policies are overriding the default kiosk configuration.
